model_output_raw_text: {"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 1024","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 512","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 2e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The current MLP still looks capacity-limited under the short fixed-step budget, so widening the hidden layers and removing dropout should help it fit CIFAR-10 more aggressively; a higher AdamW learning rate should make the larger network useful within the same step budget.","secondary_modes":["topk","caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.0","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 768","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 1024","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 2e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The last run was too aggressive and regressed validation loss, so back off to a more stable optimization regime while keeping a moderate capacity increase over the best 512-wide model.","secondary_modes":["topk","caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 1024","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 768","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The 768-wide model recovered stability, so the next step is to restore more capacity with a larger hidden width while slightly reducing the step size to avoid repeating the earlier instability from the aggressive run.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.05","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 9e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The widened model is now close to the best seen result, so make a small optimization push while easing regularization a bit to try to clear the current plateau without reintroducing the instability from the earlier aggressive run.","secondary_modes":["caching","layout"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.05","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"FC_HIDDEN = 1280","old":"FC_HIDDEN = 1024","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 9e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"hidden_dims.append(min(width * (CHANNEL_MULT**depth_index), FC_HIDDEN))","old":"hidden_dims.append(min(width * (CHANNEL_MULT**depth_index), 1024))","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The current model is effectively capped at 1024 hidden units and is now very close to the best visible result. Lift that cap to 1280 while restoring the more stable dropout, learning rate, and weight decay from the better run so the larger MLP can actually use its extra capacity.","secondary_modes":["topk","caching"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.1e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The plain 512-wide MLP is now the best-performing layout; the remaining gains are more likely from a slightly more aggressive and responsive AdamW setup than from another architecture change.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1.1e-3","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.99)","old":"ADAM_BETAS = (0.9, 0.98)","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The last small increase in step size and beta2 hurt validation loss, so revert to the prior stable AdamW settings that produced the best visible result and keep the rest unchanged.","secondary_modes":["indexing"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.05","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"The current plain 512-wide MLP is the best visible configuration, so the next low-risk move is to ease regularization a bit and see whether the model can recover a little more fit without changing the optimization geometry.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"caching","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.1","old":"DROPOUT_RATE = 0.05","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""},{"anchor":"","function":"","new":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 1e-4","old":"WEIGHT_DECAY = 5e-5","op":"replace_exact","source":"","text":""}],"primary_mode":"caching","rationale":"The low-regularization probe regressed, so restore the regularization level that produced the best visible result and keep the rest of the stable step-7 setup unchanged.","secondary_modes":["topk"]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 4","new":"DEPTH = 6","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The current best configuration appears to be capacity-limited rather than optimizer-limited, so the next safe probe is a modest depth increase while keeping the stable 512-wide, 0.1-dropout, AdamW setup unchanged.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 6","new":"DEPTH = 5","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The 6-layer stack clearly overshot, so move one notch back toward the empirically stable region while keeping the otherwise best 512-wide MLP and optimizer setup unchanged.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"layout","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"DEPTH = 5","new":"DEPTH = 4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"layout","rationale":"The depth-5 probe regressed, and the best visible result was reached with depth 4 under the same 512-wide MLP and optimizer settings, so revert that single capacity change.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 1e-3","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 9.5e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The current 512-wide MLP is stable and already the best visible configuration, so the next low-risk probe is a small learning-rate reduction to test whether the optimizer is slightly overstepping the best basin.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 9.5e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 9e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The smaller learning-rate step improved validation loss, so nudge it a bit further downward to see if the current 512-wide MLP is still slightly over-stepping the optimum.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 9e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8.5e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The last two small learning-rate reductions both improved validation loss, so continue that trend with one more modest step downward to probe whether the optimum sits slightly lower.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8.5e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8.25e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The sequence of smaller learning-rate steps has kept improving validation loss, so take one more modest step down to probe whether the optimum is still slightly lower.","secondary_modes":[]}

{"declared_mode":"topk","edit_format":"structured_edits","edits":[{"op":"replace_exact","function":"","old":"LEARNING_RATE = 8.25e-4","new":"LEARNING_RATE = 8e-4","anchor":"","text":"","source":""}],"primary_mode":"topk","rationale":"The learning-rate reductions have remained consistently helpful, so take one final small step downward to test whether the optimum is still slightly lower.","secondary_modes":[]}
